features: Key Specifications: Granicell 12-pack of lightweight lithium 1.5V AAA batteries is designed to power your electronic devices, remote controls, and household appliances. With exceptional packaging and a 10-year storage life, these batteries ensure reliable backup energy while preventing accidental drops or short circuits

Enhanced Safety and Leak-Proof Design: Featuring a three-layer safety system, Granicell batteries include an explosion-proof valve, anti-short-circuit valve, and a leak-proof sealing ring. The spiral-wound technology effectively prevents leakage, protecting your devices and making these batteries an excellent choice for high-end electronics

Wide Temperature Adaptability: Granicell batteries perform exceptionally well in extreme temperatures, functioning effectively from -40°F to 140°F. Their cold resistance surpasses that of alkaline and nickel-metal hydride batteries, making them suitable for both indoor and outdoor use

Versatile Applications: Ideal for both high and low-drain devices, Granicell AAA batteries are perfect for a variety of applications, including digital cameras, VR controllers, RC car toys, LED flashlights, emergency lanterns, portable radios, solar lights, baby toys, remote controls, and more

Convenient Packaging: Each purchase includes a full box of 12 Granicell AAA batteries. The impressive packaging is easy to store and helps prevent short circuits, ensuring your batteries remain safe and ready for use
